scripts.tau-contribute: snarkjs powersoftau contribute pot12_0000.ptau pot12_0001.ptau --name='First contribution' -v
scripts.tau-prepare: snarkjs powersoftau prepare phase2 pot12_0001.ptau pot12_final.ptau -v
scripts.setup: snarkjs groth16 setup circuits/selective_disclosure.r1cs pot12_final.ptau selective_disclosure_0000.zkey
scripts.contribute: snarkjs zkey contribute selective_disclosure_0000.zkey selective_disclosure_final.zkey --name='First contribution' -v
scripts.export-vkey: snarkjs zkey export verificationkey selective_disclosure_final.zkey verification_key.json
